rows.label: tlk70000046_02_msg0001
rows.name:
I won't name the country,
but some Drivers use Blades
like disposable items.

rows.label: tlk70000046_02_msg0002
rows.name:
And it's not just down to humans. The
Blades just go along with it like it's
meant to be that way. So weird.

rows.label: tlk70000046_02_msg0003
rows.name:
Do lives need ranks? Can
birth alone make any life
fine to treat lightly?

rows.label: tlk70000046_02_msg0004
rows.name:
Take Iira. It's peaceful as anything,
and humans, Blades and Divine Beasts
live together in harmony.

rows.label: tlk70000046_02_msg0005
rows.name:
Sometimes I wonder if it's
made Iira a bit too soft...
